message:
🌱 Add redpanda: config: output cluster configuration schema as a build step mission (#1525)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "redpanda-4811-config-output-cluster-configuration-schema-as-a-build-step",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "redpanda: config: output cluster configuration schema as a build step",
+    "description": "config: output cluster configuration schema as a build step. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current redpanda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your redpanda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nhelm list -n redpanda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working redpanda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review redpanda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant redpanda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl get configmap -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=redpanda\n```\nThis is for consumption by cloud team (and maybe docs team later), when they would like to know the config schema for a given redpanda version without having to query a running redpanda instance.\n\n1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for config: output cluster configuration schema as a build step",
+        "description": "## Cover letter\n\nAdds a general utility binary that includes all developer facing utilities that core\nintends to expose and are not included in the redpanda service binary.\n\n```\nbin/rp_util --help\nAllowed options:\n  --help                Allowed options\n  --config_schema_json  Generates JSON schema\n```yaml\nbin/rp_util --help\nAllowed options:\n  --help                Allowed options\n  --config_schema_json  Generates JSON schema for cluster configuration\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl get events -n redpanda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"config: output cluster configuration schema as a build step\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Cover letter\n\nAdds a general utility binary that includes all developer facing utilities that core\nintends to expose and are not included in the redpanda service binary.\n\n```\nbin/rp_util --help\nAllowed options:\n  --help                Allowed options\n  --config_schema_json  Generates JSON schema for cluster configuration\n```\r\n\n## Release notes\n* none",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "bin/rp_util --help\nAllowed options:\n  --help                Allowed options\n  --config_schema_json  Generates JSON schema for cluster configuration"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "redpanda",
+      "community",
+      "streaming",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "redpanda"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda/issues/4811",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/redpanda-data/redpanda/pull/5045"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with redpanda installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
